list.vod_content: Wojciech Smarzowski is one of those Polish directors whoвҖҷs popular both among the critics and with the audience, even though his films are far from being considered crowd-pleasers. In his upcoming project Good House, Smarzowski, who also penned the script, will focus on domestic violence, although nothing more has been shared about the story.

list.vod_blurb: In the midst of a record-breaking snowstorm in Spain, a young woman and a policeman on the edge gath
list.vod_content: In the midst of a record-breaking snowstorm in Spain, a young woman and a policeman on the edge gather their strengths to foil the hijacking of an armoured van.
